---
title: "Codes"
toc: false
---

::: {.page-hero}
## Code and Research Repositories

This page highlights the kinds of repositories I am building around computational modelling, behavioural analysis, and reproducible research workflows.
:::

## Repository Directions

::: {.feature-grid}
::: {.feature-card}
### Human-Model Benchmarking

Pipelines for participant-level evaluation, response-time prediction, trial-level variance analysis, and comparison with behavioural baselines.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### Multilingual LLM RSA

Code for extracting layer-wise representations, computing similarity structure, and comparing semantic geometry across languages and models.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### RNN Brain-Behaviour Modelling

Model training, hidden-state analysis, RT readout modules, and neural alignment workflows for sequence-based tasks.
:::
:::

## Tools and Workflow

::: {.grid-two}
::: {.panel-card}
### Core Stack

- Python, R
- PyTorch, Transformers, scikit-learn
- pandas, NumPy, SciPy, statsmodels
- Jupyter, Git, Quarto
:::

::: {.panel-card}
### Planned Repository Structure

- Reproducible data preprocessing
- Analysis notebooks and scripts
- Clear experiment configuration
- Figures and model-comparison outputs
:::
:::

## Suggested Public Repositories

::: {.interest-list}
- `human-model-benchmarking`
- `multilingual-llm-rsa`
- `rnn-brain-behaviour-modelling`
- `behavioural-modelling-utils`
:::
